query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'users' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user EFQWm3YEjZYnEtW.efc9f3c7dfef --database NenRJRDsdnS42xQATPd6GP --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'users' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	COLUMN_TYPE
id	bigint
name	varchar(120)
email	varchar(200)
password_hash	varchar(200)
phone	varchar(30)
cpf	varchar(20)
avatar_url	varchar(500)

address_complement	varchar(100)
address_neighborhood	varchar(100)

address_state	varchar(2)
is_active	tinyint(1)
email_verified	tinyint(1)
